title: Pudendal neuralgia - NHS
text:
e such as cycling, horse riding or sitting for a long time a growth or tumour that puts pressure on the nerve infections such as genital herpes Sometimes it's not clear what causes it.
Help and support for pudendal neuralgia 
If you have pudendal neuralgia you can get support from charities including:
the Pelvic Pain Support Network Action on Pain
